allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; tags=json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('tags',[]\); [print\(t\) for t in sorted\(tags, reverse=True\)[:50]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; tags=json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('tags',[]\); [print\(t\) for t in sorted\([t for t in tags if t.startswith\('9.'\)], reverse=True\)[:30]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; tags=json.load\(sys.stdin\).get\('tags',[]\); rhel_tags=[t for t in tags if t.startswith\('9.'\)]; print\('\\n'.join\(sorted\(rhel_tags, reverse=True\)[:30]\)\)")
